title: stillingia acutifolia
intro: Stillingia acutifolia, also known as Queen's Delight, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Stillingia acutifolia is often combined with other plants to create tonics and salves that can be used topically or taken internally.
